narrative:
Union Twp. township has 5,662 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
